content: Copy all files from cloned repo to /app (replacing template)
Configure .env files with Supabase credentials (backend) — keep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL intact (frontend)
Upload new Indian Profiles logo and get public URL
Rebrand all 'Jagruthi Leaders' → 'Indian Profiles' references (frontend + backend)
Update color scheme to logo palette (Navy #1A237E, Orange #F57C00, Magenta/Pink #E91E63)
Apply Supabase DB schema migration (new tables + columns)
Restart services and verify backend health, admin login works
Screenshot frontend to verify UI branding and colors
Manually test key CRUD flows via curl (state/district/constituency/leader)
Run testing agent for end-to-end validation
Push rebranded code back to GitHub as 'Indian Profiles'
